mapper.sql: wrk_todo_idx AS idx, wrk_todo_uuid AS uuid, work_unit_idx, mbr_acct_idx, prnt_wrk_todo_idx, ttl, dscr, sts, prgs_rt, strt_dt, due_dt, sort_ord, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_wrk_todo WHERE work_unit_idx = #{workUnitIdx} AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(prnt_wrk_todo_idx, 0) ASC, sort_ord ASC, created_at ASC, wrk_todo_idx ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_wrk_todo ( work_unit_idx, mbr_acct_idx, prnt_wrk_todo_idx, ttl, dscr, sts, prgs_rt, strt_dt, due_dt, sort_ord, created_by ) VALUES ( #{workUnitIdx}, #{mbrAcctIdx}, #{prntWrkTodoIdx}, #{ttl}, #{dscr}, #{sts}, #{prgsRt}, #{strtDt}, #{dueDt}, #{sortOrd}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_wrk_todo SET prnt_wrk_todo_idx = #{prntWrkTodoIdx}, ttl = #{ttl}, dscr = #{dscr}, strt_dt = #{strtDt}, due_dt = #{dueDt}, sort_ord = #{sortOrd}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE wrk_todo_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND work_unit_idx = #{workUnitIdx} AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_wrk_todo SET sts = #{sts}, prgs_rt = #{prgsRt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE wrk_todo_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_wrk_todo SET sort_ord = #{sortOrd}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE wrk_todo_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL

WITH RECURSIVE todo_subtree AS ( SELECT wrk_todo_idx FROM tb_wrk_todo WHERE wrk_todo_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND work_unit_idx = #{workUnitIdx} AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT child.wrk_todo_idx FROM tb_wrk_todo child INNER JOIN todo_subtree subtree ON child.prnt_wrk_todo_idx = subtree.wrk_todo_idx WHERE child.mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND child.del_at IS NULL ) UPDATE tb_wrk_todo SET updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now(), del_at = now() WHERE wrk_todo_idx IN (SELECT wrk_todo_idx FROM todo_subtree) AND del_at IS NULL
